narrative_axis: Narrative should move from tension to transformation to proof.
storyworld: A premium brand world where perception, desire, trust, and proof work as one system.
story_objective: Priorizar una promesa central, un codigo visual reconocible y una secuencia de contenido que convierta atencion en accion.

story_essence.description: La marca tiene una base aprovechable; el mayor valor esta en convertir senales en sistema.
Diferenciacion ya tiene senales utiles; conviene convertirlas en reglas repetibles.

framework.name: Current tension
framework.description: Las fuentes muestran senales utiles, pero el sistema debe separar identidad, percepcion visual, narrativa y conversion para operar con precision.

framework.name: Strategic decision
framework.description: Priorizar una promesa central, un codigo visual reconocible y una secuencia de contenido que convierta atencion en accion.

emotional_pillars.name: Trust
emotional_pillars.description: Reduce uncertainty through evidence, process, and consistency.

emotional_pillars.name: Desire
emotional_pillars.description: Make the desired experience feel tangible.

tone_voice.description: Speak with authority, sensory detail, and practical direction.

storytelling_steps.name: Tension
storytelling_steps.description: Las fuentes muestran senales utiles, pero el sistema debe separar identidad, percepcion visual, narrativa y conversion para operar con precision.

storytelling_steps.name: Reframe
storytelling_steps.description: Show the perception shift that makes the brand easier to understand and desire.

storytelling_steps.name: Proof
storytelling_steps.description: Use assets, process, and examples to make the promise believable.

storytelling_steps.name: Action
storytelling_steps.description: Close with one clear next step.

content_pillars.name: Autoridad
content_pillars.description: Demostrar criterio, metodo y dominio de la categoria.

content_pillars.name: Deseo
content_pillars.description: Convertir el destino o servicio en una experiencia deseable, no solo en itinerario.

content_pillars.name: Prueba
content_pillars.description: Reducir incertidumbre con evidencia, casos, testimonios y proceso.

content_pillars.name: Conversion
content_pillars.description: Guiar al publico hacia consulta, reserva, compra o diagnostico.

formats.name: Carousel
formats.purpose: Explain a framework, proof, or transformation.

formats.name: Story sequence
formats.purpose: Move from context to desire to action.

systems.name: Weekly narrative arc
systems.description: Alternate authority, desire, proof, and conversion.

golden_rules.name: Show the transformation
golden_rules.description: Every story should reveal before, shift, and after.

golden_rules.name: Use concrete evidence
golden_rules.description: Ground claims in signals, assets, examples, and decisions.

story_structure.description: Tell the audience what to do next.

closing_manifesto: Build stories that make the brand easier to feel, trust, remember, and choose.
manifesto: The brand story should not decorate the offer. It should make the transformation visible.
footer_claim: Designed to make the brand easier to feel, trust, remember, and choose.
